name: SonaMoney WAF Configuration
description: Cloudflare WAF rules for SonaMoney financial application

rules.name: SQL Injection Protection
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "union select" or http.request.uri.query contains "union all select" or http.request.uri.query contains "insert into" or http.request.uri.query contains "delete from" or http.request.uri.query contains "drop table" or http.request.uri.query contains "1=1")

rules.name: XSS Protection
rules.description: Block XSS patterns in query strings
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "<script>" or http.request.uri.query contains "javascript:" or http.request.uri.query contains "onload=" or http.request.uri.query contains "onerror=")

rules.name: Path Traversal Protection
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "../" or http.request.uri.path contains "..\" or http.request.uri.query contains "file://" or http.request.uri.query contains "..//")

rules.name: API Rate Limiting
rules.description: Rate limit API requests to prevent abuse

rules.name: Block Low Bot Score
rules.description: Block requests from known bad bots

rules.name: Challenge Suspected Bots
rules.description: Show managed challenge to suspected bots

rules.name: High Threat Score Block
rules.description: Block IPs with high threat score

rules.name: Medium Threat Score Challenge
rules.description: Challenge IPs with medium threat score

rules.name: Enforce API Authentication
rules.description: Block API requests without authorization header
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/" and not http.request.uri.path contains "/api/auth/" and not any(http.request.headers.names[*] == "authorization"))
